title: He held a meeting with the Secretary General of the Organization for...
title_en: He held a meeting with the Secretary General of the Organization for...
title_uk: Він провів зустріч з Генеральним секретарем Організації з...
description: He held a meeting with the Secretary General of the Organization for Economic Cooperation and Development Mathias Korman. Ukraine's membership in the OECD is very important for us. And today we are taking a step in this direction: the Prime Minister handed over to the OECD the official renewed application of Ukraine for membership. We hope to receive the status of a candidate country already this fall. The next stage is the road map to membership in the OECD. Discussed...
description_en: He held a meeting with the Secretary General of the Organization for Economic Cooperation and Development Mathias Korman. Ukraine's membership in the OECD is very important for us. And today we are taking a step in this direction: the Prime Minister handed over to the OECD the official renewed application of Ukraine for membership. We hope to receive the status of a candidate country already this fall. The next stage is the road map to membership in the OECD. Discussed...
description_uk: Провів зустріч із генеральним секретарем Організації економічного співробітництва та розвитку Матіасом Корманом. Членство України в ОЕСР для нас дуже важливе. І сьогодні робимо крок в цьому напрямі: Прем’єр-міністр передала ОЕСР офіційну поновлену заявку України на членство. Сподіваємось отримати статус країни-кандидата вже цієї осені. Наступний етап – дорожня карта до членства в ОЕСР. Обговорили...

description: Ukraine detains suspected intermediary in alleged Russian-backed plot to assassinate military intelligence official. According to the Prosecutor General's Office, the newly identified suspect, a 34-year-old former serviceman, acted as a middleman between the organizers and the suspected hitman.

title: Kyiv: At least 26 noncombat deaths, alleged abuse reported in Skelia...
title_en: Kyiv: At least 26 noncombat deaths, alleged abuse reported in Skelia...

description: At least 26 noncombat deaths, alleged abuse reported in Skelia assault regiment, Ukrainian media investigation finds. The deaths, which occurred shortly after mobilization and training, have prompted allegations from relatives and former servicemen of inadequate medical care and, in some cases, physical abuse within the unit.
description_en: At least 26 noncombat deaths, alleged abuse reported in Skelia assault regiment, Ukrainian media investigation finds. The deaths, which occurred shortly after mobilization and training, have prompted allegations from relatives and former servicemen of inadequate medical care and, in some cases, physical abuse within the unit.

title: The fuel crisis reached the main oil region of the Russian...
title_en: The fuel crisis reached the main oil region of the Russian...
title_uk: Паливна криза дісталася до головного нафтового регіону Росії...
description: The fuel crisis reached the main oil region of the Russian Federation, - rosSMY In the Khanty-Mansiysk Autonomous Okrug, where about 40% of Russian oil is produced, restrictions on the sale of fuel were introduced. At gas stations of one of the largest chains, they now dispense no more than 40 liters of gasoline and 80 liters of diesel per person. Similar measures are already in place in more than 50 regions of the Russian Federation, including Omsk, Irkutsk,...
description_en: The fuel crisis reached the main oil region of the Russian Federation, - rosSMY In the Khanty-Mansiysk Autonomous Okrug, where about 40% of Russian oil is produced, restrictions on the sale of fuel were introduced. At gas stations of one of the largest chains, they now dispense no more than 40 liters of gasoline and 80 liters of diesel per person. Similar measures are already in place in more than 50 regions of the Russian Federation, including Omsk, Irkutsk,...
description_uk: Топливный кризис добрался до главного нефтяного региона рф, - росСМИ В Ханты-Мансийском автономном округе, где добывается около 40% российской нефти, ввели ограничения на продажу топлива. На заправках одной из крупнейших сетей теперь отпускают не более 40 литров бензина и 80 литров дизеля на человека. Аналогичные меры уже действуют более чем в 50 регионах рф, включая Омскую, Иркутскую,...

description: Today is the 32nd anniversary of the Special Operations Center "Alpha" of the Security Service of Ukraine, and I am grateful to you for the fact that every year you add strength to the Center, the Security Service of Ukraine, and our entire state. Awarded state awards to the soldiers of the Central Security Service "A" of the SBU and handed over the award to the family of the fallen Hero, who was awarded this title posthumously. The Security Service of Ukraine over the years of our full-scale protection has become...
description_en: Today is the 32nd anniversary of the Special Operations Center "Alpha" of the Security Service of Ukraine, and I am grateful to you for the fact that every year you add strength to the Center, the Security Service of Ukraine, and our entire state. Awarded state awards to the soldiers of the Central Security Service "A" of the SBU and handed over the award to the family of the fallen Hero, who was awarded this title posthumously. The Security Service of Ukraine over the years of our full-scale protection has become...
description_uk: Сьогодні вже 32 роки Центру спеціальних операцій «Альфа» Служби безпеки України, і я вдячний вам за те, що кожного року ви додаєте сили і Центру, і Службі безпеки України, і всій нашій державі. Відзначив державними нагородами воїнів ЦСО «А» СБУ та передав нагороду родині загиблого Героя, удостоєного цього звання посмертно. description: Driver hospitalized as Russian strike destroys trolleybus in Sumy Oblast. A Russian guided bomb strike on June 22 destroyed a trolleybus near the city of Sumy, hospitalizing the driver who was inside the empty vehicle and injuring two others, authorities reported.

title: 🤡Russian woman burned down her own apartment on the instructions of a...
title_en: 🤡Russian woman burned down her own apartment on the instructions of a...
title_uk: 🤡Росіянка спалила власну квартиру за вказівкою...
description: 🤡Russian woman burned down her own apartment on the instructions of a swindler in order to "get insurance." The swindler offered her a "brilliant" earning scheme over the phone: start a fire at home, film everything and get an insurance payment. During the call, he literally directed the process, and when the fire started to flare up, he asked the woman to wait at least five minutes to "correctly fix" everything. More...
description_en: 🤡Russian woman burned down her own apartment on the instructions of a swindler in order to "get insurance." The swindler offered her a "brilliant" earning scheme over the phone: start a fire at home, film everything and get an insurance payment. During the call, he literally directed the process, and when the fire started to flare up, he asked the woman to wait at least five minutes to "correctly fix" everything. More...
description_uk: 🤡россиянка сожгла собственную квартиру по инструкции мошенника, чтобы «получить страховку» Аферист по телефону предложил ей «гениальную» схему заработка: устроить пожар дома, снять все на видео и получить страховую выплату. Во время звонка он буквально руководил процессом, а когда огонь начал разгораться — просил женщину подождать минимум пять минут, чтобы все «правильно зафиксировать». Более...

Increased activity on the city continues for some time, and given the successes of the Muscovites in Kostyantynivka, Liman is becoming an increasingly relevant target. And the quantitative advantage is small...

In particular, we are talking about fixation of lesions in the eastern part of the city, which logically leads to the conclusion that katsaps are seeping there. description_uk: Ситуація в районі Лиману ℹ️ Останнім часом багато обговорень та запитань лунає щодо Лиману. Зокрема, йдеться про фіксації уражень в східній частині міста, що логічно виводить на висновки, що кацапи туди просочуються. Підвищена активність на місто триває протягом певного часу, а враховуючи успіхи московитів на Костянтинівці, Лиман стає все більш актуальною ціллю. А кількісна перевага та мала...

title: 😐 Well... Polish politicians, after Ukraine, began to refuse awards....
title_en: 😐 Well... Polish politicians, after Ukraine, began to refuse awards....
title_uk: 😐 Ну... польські політики слідом за Україною почали відмовлятися від нагород....
description: 😐 Well... Polish politicians, after Ukraine, began to refuse awards. Vice-Marshal of the Polish Senate Michal Kaminsky said that he is returning to Ukraine two of his awards received for supporting European integration. The reason is still the same: disagreements over issues of historical memory, in particular the Volyn tragedy. According to him, Warsaw cannot ignore the heroization of OUN and UPA figures. At the same time, Kaminsky...
description_en: 😐 Well... Polish politicians, after Ukraine, began to refuse awards. Vice-Marshal of the Polish Senate Michal Kaminsky said that he is returning to Ukraine two of his awards received for supporting European integration. The reason is still the same: disagreements over issues of historical memory, in particular the Volyn tragedy. According to him, Warsaw cannot ignore the heroization of OUN and UPA figures. At the same time, Kaminsky...
description_uk: 😐Что ж… Польские политики вслед за Украиной начали отказываться от наград Вице-маршал Сената Польши Михал Каминский заявил, что возвращает Украине две свои награды, полученные за поддержку евроинтеграции. Причина все та же: разногласия вокруг вопросов исторической памяти, в частности Волынской трагедии. По его словам, Варшава не может игнорировать героизацию деятелей ОУН и УПА. При этом Каминский...
